description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for channel-level analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Traffic source that first acquired the user (e.g. facebook / google / (direct)).
Campaign name under which the user was first acquired.
Numeric ID of the campaign under which the user was first acquired.
GA4 default channel grouping assigned to the user's first session (e.g. Organic Social / Paid Search / Direct / Referral / Organic Search). Key dimension for channel performance analysis.
Marketing medium that first acquired the user (e.g. brand awareness / cpc / organic).
Number of completed ecommerce transactions from users in this channel group.
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged (0.0–1.0).
Number of engaged sessions attributed to this channel group.
Average session duration in seconds for this channel.
Total users (new + returning) from this channel.
Number of active users from this channel.
Number of first-time users acquired through this channel.
Total sessions attributed to this channel group.
Total page or screen views from sessions in this channel group.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
